revision.comment: Changed protection settings for "[[Module:Japanese calendar/data]]": Up to template-protection as dependency of template-protected [[Module:Year in various calendars]] ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require administrator access] (indefinite))
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported
